reference: Hello and welcome to hypertrophic cardiomyopathy. Since your husband had an implantable cardioverter-defibrillator and an ablation, which you say is successful, I would like to inform you that he has a good prognosis as he now has a good ejection fraction and no recurrent ventricular tachycardia. Just remind him to be regular with his medications and doctor appointments.
text: Hello and welcome to hypertrophic cardiomyopathy. Since your husband had an implantable cardioverter defibrillator and an ablation, which you say is successful, I would like to inform you that he has a good prognosis as he now has a good ejection fraction and no recurrent ventricular tachycardia. Just remind him to be regular with his medications and doctor appointments.
